  "findings": [
    "S-trap configuration is installed, which is prone to siphoning the trap seal.",
    "Lack of proper venting for the fixture trap."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Cut out the S-trap configuration.",
    "Reconstruct the drain with a sanitary tee to establish a proper fixture drain and vent line (P-trap configuration).",
    "Ensure the trap arm length and vent connection comply with IPC/UPC distance requirements."
  ],
  "rationale": "S-traps are explicitly prohibited by both the International Plumbing Code (IPC) and the Uniform Plumbing Code (UPC) because they lack a vent at the crown, causing the trap seal to siphon out and allow sewer gases to enter the living space.",
  "references": [
    "IPC Section 1002.3 (Prohibited Traps)",
    "UPC Section 1004.1 (Prohibited Traps)"
  ]
}
